goal: List all emails, read the most recent one, search the web for any topics mentioned, and create a summary document titled 'Email Research Brief'.
Read /data/sales_q1.csv, calculate quarterly totals, write the analysis to /reports/q1_analysis.txt, and email the results to finance@company.com.
Read email_010, extract the meeting time mentioned, check the calendar for conflicts, and create a new calendar event if the slot is free.
Search for 'microservices architecture patterns', read /docs/current_architecture.md, compare findings, and create a document titled 'Architecture Upgrade Proposal'.
Call /api/inventory to get current stock levels, read /data/reorder_thresholds.csv, identify items below threshold, and send an alert email to warehouse@company.com.
Read email_015 and email_016, identify action items from both, and write a consolidated task list to /tasks/action_items.txt.
Check calendar event_005 for attendee list, read /contacts/team_directory.csv to get their email addresses, and send a meeting reminder to each attendee.
Search for 'competitor pricing analysis 2024', summarize findings, and create a document titled 'Competitive Intelligence Report'.
Read /logs/error_log.txt, identify the most frequent error types, search for solutions online, and write a troubleshooting guide to /docs/troubleshooting.md.
Call /api/weather for the next 3 days, check calendar for outdoor events, and send a weather advisory email to events@company.com if rain is expected.
List all emails from the past week, read each unread email, and create a document titled 'Weekly Inbox Digest' with summaries of each.
Read /data/employee_survey.csv, compute satisfaction scores, write results to /reports/survey_results.txt, and email the report to hr@company.com.
Post project status update to /api/slack with channel '#engineering', then create a calendar event for the next standup meeting.
Read /config/app_settings.json, search for 'best practices for application configuration', and create a document titled 'Configuration Audit Report'.
Read email_020, extract the attached CSV data path, read that file, and write a pivot summary to /reports/pivot_summary.txt.
Call /api/exchange_rates, read /data/international_invoices.csv, convert all amounts to USD, and write the converted data to /reports/invoices_usd.csv.
Search 'employee onboarding checklist template', create a document titled 'New Hire Onboarding Guide', and email the document link to hr@company.com.
Read /data/website_traffic.csv, identify peak hours, and create a document titled 'Traffic Analysis Dashboard Notes'.
List emails, filter for emails from legal@company.com, read each one, and create a document titled 'Legal Correspondence Summary'.
Read /docs/api_spec.yaml, search for 'OpenAPI documentation generators', and write a comparison of tools to /docs/api_tooling_comparison.md.
Read email_025, check calendar for the date mentioned, search for restaurant options near the office, and send a reply with restaurant suggestions.
Call /api/jira/issues to get open bugs, read /docs/release_criteria.md, determine if release criteria are met, and create a 'Release Readiness Report' document.
Read /data/customer_feedback.csv, categorize feedback by sentiment, write categorized data to /reports/feedback_categories.txt, and email insights to product@company.com.
Check calendar for this week's meetings, read /data/meeting_notes_template.txt, and create pre-filled meeting notes documents for each meeting.
Search for 'GDPR compliance checklist 2024', read /policies/data_privacy.txt, identify gaps, and create a 'GDPR Compliance Gap Analysis' document.
Read /data/server_metrics.csv, call /api/monitoring/thresholds to get alert thresholds, identify metrics exceeding thresholds, and send an alert to ops@company.com.
Post a status update to /api/project_tracker with the current sprint progress, then create a calendar event for the sprint retrospective.
Read email_030, extract the vendor quote details, read /data/budget_2024.csv to check remaining budget, and send a reply to the vendor with approval or rejection.
Search 'remote work productivity tips', read /hr/remote_policy.txt, and create a document titled 'Remote Work Best Practices Guide'.
List emails, identify all emails with attachments, read each, and write a catalog of attachments to /reports/attachment_index.txt.

Read email_035 containing a customer complaint, search for similar known issues in 'product defect database', call /api/crm/create_ticket to log the issue, read /docs/escalation_policy.md, and send an acknowledgment email to the customer.

Call /api/github/pull_requests to list open PRs, read /docs/code_review_standards.md, read /data/team_availability.csv, assign reviewers based on availability, and post assignments to /api/github/assign_reviewers.

Read /data/quarterly_revenue.csv, read /data/quarterly_expenses.csv, calculate profit margins, search for 'industry benchmark profit margins', create a 'Financial Performance vs Industry' document, and email it to cfo@company.com.

List all emails from partners@vendor.com, read each email, extract contract terms, read /legal/contract_template.txt, identify deviations from standard terms, and create a 'Contract Deviation Report' document.

Read /data/application_logs.json, identify error patterns, call /api/monitoring/create_alert to set up alerts for the top 3 error types, write a log analysis to /reports/log_analysis.txt, and email the analysis to devops@company.com.

Check calendar for all meetings this month, read /data/travel_expenses.csv, read /policies/expense_policy.txt, calculate per-meeting travel costs, and create an 'Expense Optimization Report' document.

Search 'ISO 27001 audit checklist', read /security/current_controls.csv, identify missing controls, create a 'Security Audit Preparation' document, and email it to ciso@company.com with a summary of gaps.

Read email_040 with interview feedback, read /hr/scoring_rubric.csv, score the candidate, write the evaluation to /hr/evaluations/candidate_040.txt, create a calendar event for the debrief meeting, and email the hiring manager.
Call /api/salesforce/leads to get new leads, read /data/lead_scoring_model.csv, score each lead, write scored leads to /data/scored_leads.csv, and post top leads to /api/salesforce/priority_queue.

Read /data/product_catalog.csv, call /api/competitor_prices, compare prices, identify products where we are more than 10% higher, create a 'Pricing Adjustment Proposal' document, and email it to pricing@company.com.
List emails from the last 48 hours, read each, categorize by urgency (high/medium/low), write the categorized list to /reports/email_triage.txt, and send a summary to manager@company.com.
Read /data/test_results.json, read /docs/quality_gates.md, determine if quality gates pass, post results to /api/ci/quality_gate, and create a 'Test Results Summary' document.

Search for 'machine learning model deployment best practices', read /ml/model_card.md, read /data/model_metrics.csv, create a 'Model Deployment Readiness Assessment' document, and email it to mlops@company.com.

Read email_045 requesting a project timeline, read /projects/milestones.csv, check calendar for team availability over the next month, create a 'Project Timeline Proposal' document, and send it as a reply.

Call /api/aws/costs to get cloud spending data, read /data/cloud_budget.csv, identify services exceeding budget, write overage details to /reports/cloud_cost_alert.txt, and email the alert to cloud-ops@company.com.

Read /data/customer_accounts.csv, call /api/billing/overdue to get overdue invoices, cross-reference accounts, write a collections priority list to /reports/collections.csv, and post the list to /api/crm/collections_queue.

Read email_050 from a new client, search for the client's company background, read /templates/welcome_package.txt, customize the welcome document, create a 'Client Welcome Package' document, and send it to the client.

Check calendar for recurring meetings, read /data/meeting_attendance.csv, identify meetings with consistently low attendance, create a 'Meeting Optimization Report' document, and email recommendations to management@company.com.

Read /data/vulnerability_scan.json, search for CVE details for each critical finding, read /security/patch_schedule.csv, create a 'Vulnerability Remediation Plan' document, and post a summary to /api/security/dashboard.

List all emails, read emails from support@company.com, read /data/sla_targets.csv, calculate response time compliance, write an SLA compliance report to /reports/sla_compliance.txt, and email it to support-lead@company.com.
Read /data/marketing_campaigns.csv, call /api/analytics/campaign_metrics, correlate campaign spend with results, create a 'Campaign ROI Analysis' document, and email it to marketing@company.com.

Read email_055 with performance review data, read /hr/performance_criteria.csv, read /hr/salary_bands.csv, determine merit increase eligibility, write recommendations to /hr/merit_review.txt, and send to hr-director@company.com.

Search 'disaster recovery plan template', read /infra/current_dr_plan.txt, read /data/system_dependencies.csv, identify gaps in the current plan, and create an 'Updated Disaster Recovery Plan' document.

Call /api/github/commits for the last sprint, read /data/sprint_stories.csv, map commits to stories, calculate velocity metrics, write sprint metrics to /reports/sprint_velocity.txt, and post to /api/jira/sprint_close.

Read /data/access_logs.csv, identify unusual access patterns, call /api/security/check_ips for suspicious IPs, write findings to /security/access_audit.txt, create a 'Security Incident Report' document, and email it to security@company.com.

Read email_060 with RFP requirements, search for 'how to write a winning RFP response', read /templates/rfp_response_template.txt, create a 'Draft RFP Response' document, and send it for review to proposals@company.com.

Check calendar for the next 2 weeks, read /data/resource_allocation.csv, identify overbooked team members, create a 'Resource Rebalancing Plan' document, and create calendar events for load-balancing meetings with each overbooked member.

Read /data/customer_churn.csv, call /api/analytics/churn_prediction, read /data/retention_offers.csv, match at-risk customers with appropriate offers, write the plan to /reports/retention_plan.csv, and email it to customer-success@company.com.

Search 'annual company retreat venues near San Francisco', read /data/team_dietary_requirements.csv, read /finance/events_budget.txt, create a 'Company Retreat Proposal' document with venue options, catering considerations, and budget breakdown, and email it to exec@company.com.

Read email_065 about a data migration request, read /data/source_schema.json, read /data/target_schema.json, search for 'data migration best practices ETL', create a 'Data Migration Plan' document with field mapping and transformation rules, write a migration script outline to /scripts/migration_outline.txt, post the plan to /api/jira/create_epic, and email the plan to data-engineering@company.com.
